title: Over The Door Hook, Over Door Hanger for Coat, Towel, Bag, Robe (1 Pack, White)
features: 【Product Size】：Large over door hook: 16.5"*8.6"（42cm*22cm）, Fits all standard doors up to 1.88" (4.7cm) thick. For best experience, we suggest to the doors from 1.37"to1.85" (3.5cm to 4.7cm). For prefect closing the door with this hook, be sure there enough gap above 1.5mm（a coin thick）over the door.
【Easily Hanging】: This coat hook has none nail, so it doesn't need to be installed and can protect the wall very well.
【Humanized Design】: The upper hook will not protrude too much, nor will it prevent the door from opening or closing.
【Multi-purpose】: The hook can be used on the door of the bedroom, bathroom, office, also can be used for cabinets, wardrobes, etc.
【Widely Use】: Suitable for hanging towels, robes, scarves, coats, clothes, hats, keys, umbrellas, scarfs, shopping bags, handbags etc. It can make your room look more orderly and tidy.
description: Product Description WBDXWB Heart-Beat Over Door Hook-Registered Design Patent Heart-Shaped Door Hook: Add a Touch of Charm to Your Space！Our heart-shaped door hook is the perfect blend of functionality and charm. Crafted with a unique heart design, it adds a cute and stylish touch to any room while keeping your belongings organized. --No drilling or complicated installation process required. Simply place it on top of the door and you're done! --Made with premium quality iron, these hooks are built to last and withstand daily use. --Large size hooks, you will have enough space to hang coats, hats, bags, clothes, towels, etc. --Designed to fit over most standard doors, making them a versatile addition to any room in your home. Warm reminder before placing an order: 1. Please make sure to confirm whether the size of the door can fit our product before purchasing, in order to avoid giving you a bad shopping experience. 2. Please use within the load-bearing range of the hook and do not hang large items that are too heavy. 3. We rigorously inspect each item before delivery to ensure there are no defects before shipping. However, it is inevitable that the package may be squeezed/pressed/dropped during transportation. If the product has defects due to these reasons, please cont-act us in a timely manner and we will provide you with a satisfactory solution. We have a rich product line to provide you with high-quality, exquisite and practical hook products: 1.Lovely Heartbeat Series Hook 2.Qute Sleeping Cat Series Hook 3.Heavy Duty 3-Prong Series Hook More product series......
